description: agent-manifesto 新基盤 Lean ライブラリの artifact manifest. GA-I1 (artifact-manifest assumption refs layer) の新基盤実装.

artifacts.codec_completeness: bidirectional (render + parse + round-trip example-level verified + 125-case universal via decide)
round_trip_properties: ∀ stable v, parse (render v) = some v (individual examples verified)
∀ pre-release v, parse (render v) = some v (individual examples verified for version)
artifacts.ordering: lexicographic total order (major > minor > patch > preRelease; stable > pre-release per SemVer 2.0)

test_targets: AgentSpec.SemVer round-trip (parse ∘ render = some, TyDD-H3 BiTrSpec forward direction)
AgentSpec.SemVer.parse negative cases (empty, invalid, truncated, dangling hyphen)

tydd_alignment.H3_BiTrSpec: example-level for version + stable release + Fin 5 finite-bounded universal
tydd_alignment.F2_lattice_prelim: LE / LT / Ord instance on SemVer (lexicographic)
tydd_alignment.H7_3level_verify: declarative in README (L3 Lean only in Week 1, L2/L1 planned)
tydd_alignment.GA_S15_lattice_basis: Ord instance as foundation for Week 4-5 ResearchSpec Lattice

provides_instances: LT FolgeID (Day 5 追加: a < b ⇔ a ≤ b ∧ a ≠ b)
PartialOrder FolgeID (Day 5 追加: Mathlib bundle、le_refl'/le_trans'/le_antisymm' を field)
artifacts.ordering: prefix partial order (not total); a ≤ b ⇔ a.path is prefix of b.path
artifacts.week2_status: Day 5 で PartialOrder/LT 拡張完了 (Section 10.1 元 plan)。Ord (lex total order) は Day 6+ または Week 4-5 へ繰り延べ。tydd_alignment: F2 部分達成 (Lattice 完全形は Week 4-5)

provides_theorems: roundTrip_bounded_stable_8 (Day 5 追加: 8³ = 512 cases via decide、10³ は heartbeat 超過)
artifacts.week2_status: Day 5 部分達成: 6 helper theorems + bounded 8³ 拡張。universal theorem `roundTripUniversal_proved` は consumeNat correctness + String/List interop + parseList induction (100+ 行) のため Day 6/Week 3 へ繰り延げ。Lean-Auto 統合 (Week 6、Section 2.10 で 🔴 格上げ済) 後の SMT hammer 自動証明発見の可能性あり
artifacts.day5_decide_heartbeat_limit: 10³ = 1000 ケースで heartbeat 200000 超過 (timeout)、現実的上限は 8³ = 512

Day 5 Pattern #7 hook 化 + LearningStage LE/LT + FolgeID PartialOrder (Mathlib import) + RoundTrip 部分達成。logprob margin 0.049 (Mathlib 影響)、A1 lt_iff_le_not_ge field はビルド成功で resolve

Day 9 Provenance 層継続 ResearchEntity + ResearchActivity + Mapping (Q1 A / Q2 A-Minimal / Q3 案 A / Q4 案 A 循環依存回避設計)。logprob margin 0.601、informational I1 verifier_history Day 1-9 一括追加 (本 commit 対処)、I2/I3 Day 10+ 検討
